seoTitle: How to Assign Tickets in Freshdesk
metaDescription: Learn how to assign support tickets to specific agents or groups in Freshdesk so the right person handles each customer request.
intro: Getting tickets to the right agent quickly keeps response times low and customers happy. This guide shows how to assign tickets manually and set up routing so your team never wonders who owns what.

steps.heading: Open the ticket you want to assign
steps.body: Go to your ticket list and click into the ticket that needs an owner.

steps.heading: Select an agent or group
steps.body: Use the assignment dropdown to choose an individual agent or a group responsible for that type of request.

steps.heading: Confirm the assignment
steps.body: Save the change so the ticket appears in the assigned agent's queue and they receive a notification.

steps.heading: Set up automatic assignment rules
steps.body: For recurring patterns, configure automation rules that assign tickets automatically based on criteria like category or keywords.

faq.question: Can I reassign a ticket after it's been assigned?
faq.answer: Yes, you can change the assignee at any time by updating the assignment field on the ticket.

faq.question: Can tickets be assigned to a group instead of a person?
faq.answer: Yes, Freshdesk lets you assign tickets to a group, and any agent in that group can pick it up.

faq.question: Does the agent get notified when assigned a ticket?
faq.answer: Yes, agents typically receive a notification when a ticket is assigned to them.

faq.question: Can ticket assignment be automated?
faq.answer: Yes, you can set up automation rules to assign tickets automatically based on conditions you define.
